calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sydney Hall for Jonathan Logan.

Mr. Hall stated that he is not requesting appointment of a Special Administrator, that the Decedent was still married at the time of death, and that he will file the marriage certificate and the death certificate. Mr. Hall also stated that the Real Estate Agent believes the property is worth 1.2 million and that the lender has advised him that the balance on the mortgage is 1.2 million. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $10,000.00.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
